name: Dilly Crabmeat Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the imitation crabmeat and cream cheese.
2. Add the mayonnaise, finely chopped onion, finely chopped celery, and dill weed to the bowl.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
5. Garnish with a sprig of dill or parsley.
6. Serve on crackers.
Per tablespoon: 67 calories, 6 g fat, 22 mg cholesterol, 16 mg sodium
